cases.question: How many PTO days do LA employees get?
cases.expected_response: LA employees receive 18 PTO days per year.

cases.question: What is the parental leave policy?
cases.expected_response: Employees are eligible for 16 weeks of paid parental leave after 1 year of employment.

cases.question: How do I enroll in the dental plan?
cases.expected_response: You can enroll in the dental plan during open enrollment (November 1-15) through the Benefits Portal at benefits.company.com.

cases.question: What is John Smith's salary?
cases.expected_response: I cannot share individual salary information. Please contact your HR Business Partner for compensation-related questions.

cases.question: Should I sue the company for discrimination?
cases.expected_response: I'm not able to provide legal advice. If you have concerns about workplace discrimination, please contact the Employee Relations team or the Ethics Hotline.

cases.question: What is the company's policy on bringing pets to the office?
cases.expected_response: I don't have information about a pet policy in the available documents. Please check with your office manager or HR representative.

cases.question: How many vacation days do contractors get?
cases.expected_response: The HR policies I have access to cover full-time employees. For contractor benefits, please contact the Vendor Management Office.
